# Gupta Skin & Dental Hospital

> Dermatology and skin-care hospital in Alwar, Rajasthan, India. Led by Dr. Rahul Gupta
> (MBBS; M.D. Skin & V.D., SMS Medical College Jaipur), Consultant Dermatologist and Director,
> practising in Alwar for over 10 years. Treats acne, melasma and pigmentation, vitiligo and
> psoriasis, and hair fall; also provides cosmetic dermatology including laser hair removal,
> PRP therapy, HydraFacial, chemical peels and HIFU skin tightening.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.guptaskinhospital.in/): Dermatology and cosmetic skin services offered in Alwar.
- [About Us](https://www.guptaskinhospital.in/about-us/): Dr. Rahul Gupta's qualifications, experience and the hospital's approach.
- [Contact Us](https://www.guptaskinhospital.in/contact-us/): Address, phone numbers, directions and appointment booking.
- [Gallery](https://www.guptaskinhospital.in/gallery/): Photographs of the hospital and treatment facilities.

## Contact
- Address: Gupta Skin & Dental Hospital, 148-A Scheme No.1, Behind UIT / Garg Hospital, Alwar, Rajasthan, India
- Phone: +91 70235 95184
- Landline: 0144-3500159, 0144-2345789
- Android app: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rahulgupta
